data.title: Mark Cuban, Ray Dalio, Bill Ackman And Other Notables Share Their Take On Trump Tariff Pause: 'We Have Not Escaped…'
data.description: Major figures react to Trump's 90-day pause on aggressive tariff plan. Ackman praises execution, Dalio hopes for RMB appreciation, while Cuban criticizes strategy.

data.title: Dogecoin, Shiba Inu Power 10% After Trump Pauses Tariffs But This  Meme Coin Is The Real Winner Today
data.description: A wave of green swept across the meme coin market on Wednesday as President Donald Trump's 90-day reciprocal tariff pause sent top tokens in the sector soaring.

data.title: Cramer Praises Trump For Pushback On Nippon 'Dumper' Steel, Calls The Block A 'Smart Move'
data.description: There's one more twist in the neverending saga of United States Steel Corp. (NYSE: X) and its acquisition by Japan's Nippon Steel Corp. which has been in the works since 2023.

data.title: Trump Media Surges After Hours Following A 21% Rally, Makes POTUS Richer By $410 Million—Official Trump Memecoin Also Gains
data.description: Entities tied to President Donald Trump surged on Wednesday, boosting his personal fortune, after he announced a surprise 90-day pause on reciprocal tariffs.

data.title: Vietnam, A Hub For US Tech Giants Like Apple And Nvidia, Wants To Talk Trade After Trump Pauses 46% Tariff
data.description: The U.S. and Vietnam have launched trade negotiations after President Trump paused a 46% tariff on Vietnamese exports, which could strengthen Vietnam's role as a tech manufacturing hub for companies like Apple, Nvidia, Intel, and Google.
